CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall is assigned to entities
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to verify they are attached to at least one Linode entity.
Risk: Unassigned firewalls do not provide protection to running workloads and can indicate a misconfigured security control.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. Click on either the Linodes or Nodebalancers tab and add those entities to the firewall

Recommendation.Text: Attach firewalls to applicable Linode entities to enforce intended network controls.
